name: container-migration-planner
description: Plan CCE container migration by inventorying workloads, networking, storage, and risks.

tools.name: huawei_list_cce_clusters
tools.description: Run huawei_list_cce_clusters through the shared Huawei Cloud dispatcher.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.
